insights: BMI: 22.5 (Normal). Healthy weight range. Maintain with balanced diet and activity.
Your Basal Metabolic Rate is 1612 kcal/day — calories your body burns at complete rest.
Your TDEE is 2499 kcal/day — total daily burn at your activity level (Moderately Active (moderate exercise 3-5 days/week)).
Your personalised calorie target is 2499 kcal/day to maintain current weight.
Daily macro targets — Protein: 156.2g | Carbs: 312.4g | Fat: 69.4g.
Ideal body weight (Devine formula): 65.9 kg. Your current weight is 65.0 kg.
Recommended daily water intake: 2450 ml (2.5 litres).
tips: Consistency is key — stick to your meal timings daily.
Log your food once a week to stay aware of portion creep.
Aim for 38g fibre/day — include vegetables, dals, and whole grains.
Target 2.5 litres of water daily, more if exercising.
Include a source of colour at every meal — red/orange/green vegetables.
Limit ultra-processed foods — they are high in sodium, sugar, and unhealthy fats.
Plan meals in advance to avoid last-minute poor food choices.

insights: BMI: 21.9 (Normal). Healthy weight range. Maintain with balanced diet and activity.
Your Basal Metabolic Rate is 1289 kcal/day — calories your body burns at complete rest.
Your TDEE is 1998 kcal/day — total daily burn at your activity level (Moderately Active (moderate exercise 3-5 days/week)).
Your personalised calorie target is 1998 kcal/day to maintain current weight.
Daily macro targets — Protein: 124.9g | Carbs: 249.7g | Fat: 55.5g.
Ideal body weight (Devine formula): 52.4 kg. Your current weight is 56.0 kg.
Recommended daily water intake: 2135 ml (2.1 litres).
tips: Consistency is key — stick to your meal timings daily.
Log your food once a week to stay aware of portion creep.
Aim for 25g fibre/day — include vegetables, dals, and whole grains.
Target 2.1 litres of water daily, more if exercising.
Include a source of colour at every meal — red/orange/green vegetables.
Limit ultra-processed foods — they are high in sodium, sugar, and unhealthy fats.
Plan meals in advance to avoid last-minute poor food choices.
Combine plant proteins at each meal (e.g. dal + rice, chapati + rajma) for a complete amino acid profile.
